data.scene: User views notification history on the Notification History screen.
data.purpose: Display previously received push notifications (title, message, image URLs) for user review.
data.source: Local Room database (notification table), populated by MessagingManager upon receiving FCM push messages.
data.item: Push notification title, message body, image URLs, and tag
data.frequency: On-demand when user opens the Notification History screen
data.processing: Local only (Room database query via DAO)
data.storage: Stored locally in Room database (notification table) until deleted by user or system
data.recipient: Device-local only (displayed within the app UI)
data.thirdparty: No third-party involvement; push notifications originate from Home Assistant server but history is stored and viewed locally

permissions.name: POST_NOTIFICATIONS (Android 13+)
permissions.scene: When the app needs to display a push notification for the first time, or when the user enables notifications for the app in Settings.
permissions.authorization: Android runtime permission dialog at first notification, or system Settings -> App -> Notifications
permissions.purpose: Allow the app to show push notifications in the system notification tray
permissions.impact: If denied, the app cannot display push notifications; notifications will be silently dropped; notification history will not be populated

data.scene: User manages notification channels in Notification Settings.
data.purpose: Read, create, and delete Android notification channels to control how different categories of notifications behave (sound, vibration, importance).
data.item: Notification channel configuration (channel ID, name, description, importance level, sound settings, vibration pattern)
data.frequency: On-demand when user opens the Notification Settings screen
data.storage: Managed by Android system; no additional storage by the app

permissions.name: POST_NOTIFICATIONS (Android 13+)
permissions.scene: When the app needs to display a push notification for the first time, or when the user enables notifications for the app in Settings.
permissions.authorization: Android runtime permission dialog at first notification, or system Settings -> App -> Notifications
permissions.purpose: Allow the app to show push notifications in the system notification tray
permissions.impact: If denied, the app cannot display push notifications; notifications will be silently dropped; notification history will not be populated
